hero.title: End-to-end business automation
hero.subtitle: ERP/CRM systems, Telegram bots and AI integrations for retail, logistics and manufacturing. From requirements to a working solution.

about.title: About me
about.text: Freelance developer based in Uzbekistan, specializing in business process automation: ERP/CRM systems, Telegram bots, AI integration and custom software development. I work with retail, logistics, garment manufacturing and hospitality businesses.

erp.title: ERP/CRM systems
erp.text: Warehouse, production and order management; barcodes/QR, label printing.

bots.title: Telegram bots
bots.text: Sales, delivery, digital memberships, encrypted communication channels.

ai.title: AI integrations
ai.text: Document processing automation, smart data parsing, AI-generated reports.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Ready to discuss your project — message me on Telegram, it's the fastest way to reach me.
